overall.description: A static cinematic shot from a video game (Red Dead Redemption 2) showing two characters sitting in a Native American camp setting. One character sits near a teepee working with their hands while another sits wrapped in a blanket, with pine trees and a wooden cabin visible in the background under clear morning light.

segments.scene_description: A peaceful morning scene in a rural camp setting with two characters sitting on wooden furniture. The left character sits near a large teepee structure engaged in handcrafting, while the right character sits wrapped in a blanket. A wooden wagon wheel and rustic cabin are visible in the background surrounded by tall pine trees under clear blue skies.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot presents a static, cinematic view of a peaceful rural camp bathed in the clear light of a morning sky. It begins by focusing on two characters resting on wooden furniture, with one figure engaged in handcrafting near a large teepee while the other sits quietly wrapped in a blanket. As the eye wanders across the scene, the composition reveals rustic details like a wooden wagon wheel and a weathered cabin. The view finally expands to encompass the surrounding environment, where tall pine trees frame the camp under a vast, cloudless blue horizon.
